delivery.description: How to deliver the result (default: snapshot)

delivery_target.description: Phone number for SMS/voice delivery (E.164 format), not needed for snapshot/notification

frequency_hint.description: Human-readable description of the schedule (e.g., 'Every day at 7 AM')

model.description: Which AI model should execute this job. Use 'computer-use' for tasks needing desktop/browser/GUI interaction (default: gemini)

name.description: A short, descriptive name for this task (e.g., 'Morning Server Check')

one_shot.description: If true, run once and auto-delete (for one-time reminders). Default: false

prompt.description: The prompt/instruction that will be sent to the AI when the job fires

schedule.description: Cron expression (e.g., '0 7 * * *' for daily at 7 AM, '*/30 * * * *' for every 30 minutes)

function_declarations.description: Edit an existing scheduled task (cron job). Change the prompt, schedule, delivery method, or other settings.

delivery_target.description: New phone number for SMS/voice delivery

job_id.description: The ID of the cron job to edit

model.description: Change which AI model executes this job

pause.description: Set to true to pause the job, false to resume it

prompt.description: New prompt/instruction for the job

function_declarations.name: extend_video

video_url.description: URL of the video to extend (e.g. /ui/uploads/video.mp4)

text.description: Text to convert to speech. Include emotional cues inline (e.g. 'said with determination', 'whispered nervously').

voice.description: Voice name: Zephyr, Puck, Charon, Kore, Fenrir, Leda, Orus, Aoede, and 22 more (default: Charon)

function_declarations.description: Generate images using Gemini's Nano Banana Pro (gemini-3-pro-image-preview). Supports text-to-image AND image-to-image. For image-to-image, pass reference_images URLs from previous generations to guide style/content. Returns a task_id that completes asynchronously.
function_declarations.name: generate_image

numberOfImages.description: Number of images to generate (1-4). Default: 1

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate. Be specific about subjects, style, composition, lighting, colors, and mood.

reference_images.description: URLs of reference images for style/content guidance (e.g., ['/ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png']). Use for image-to-image generation. Max 10 images recommended.

resolution.description: Image resolution: '1K' (1024px), '2K' (2048px), '4K' (4096px). Higher = more detail but slower. Default: '1K'

function_declarations.description: Generate 30-second instrumental music using Lyria-002. CRITICAL: Translate user requests into allowed vocabulary. The API REJECTS genre names, style words, and artist references. ONLY USE: instrument names + tempo + texture. Example: 'EDM' -> 'Synthesizer arpeggios with pulsing bass, fast driving tempo'.
function_declarations.name: generate_music

prompt.description: TRANSLATED description using ONLY: Instruments (piano, guitar, drums, bass, synth, strings, brass, etc.) + Tempo (fast, slow, moderate, driving, laid-back) + Texture (warm, bright, dark, smooth, aggressive, dense, sparse). FORBIDDEN: genre names, style words, artist names.

function_declarations.description: Generate videos using Google's Veo 3.1. Supports THREE modes: (1) text-to-video (just prompt), (2) image-to-video (pass image_url to animate an image), (3) video-extension (pass video_url to extend/continue an existing video). Returns a task_id (takes 5-20 minutes).

duration.description: Video duration in seconds: 4, 6, or 8. Default: 8

image_url.description: URL of an image to animate (e.g., /ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png). If provided, creates image-to-video instead of text-to-video.

negativePrompt.description: Optional. Things to exclude from the video

prompt.description: For text-to-video: full video description. For image-to-video: describe how the image should animate. For video-extension: describe what happens NEXT in the video.

resolution.description: Video resolution: '720p' or '1080p'. IMPORTANT: Video extension (video_url) REQUIRES '720p'. Default: '720p'

video_url.description: URL of a video to EXTEND. If provided, creates a continuation of that video guided by the prompt. Takes priority over image_url.

delivery_target.description: Phone number for SMS/voice delivery (E.164 format), not needed for snapshot/notification

frequency_hint.description: Human-readable description of the schedule (e.g., 'Every day at 7 AM')

openai_realtime.description: Generate images using Gemini's Nano Banana Pro (gemini-3-pro-image-preview). Supports text-to-image AND image-to-image. For image-to-image, pass reference_images URLs from previous generations to guide style/content. Returns a task_id that completes asynchronously.
openai_realtime.name: generate_image

numberOfImages.description: Number of images to generate (1-4). Default: 1

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate. Be specific about subjects, style, composition, lighting, colors, and mood.

reference_images.description: URLs of reference images for style/content guidance (e.g., ['/ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png']). Use for image-to-image generation. Max 10 images recommended.

resolution.description: Image resolution: '1K' (1024px), '2K' (2048px), '4K' (4096px). Higher = more detail but slower. Default: '1K'

openai_realtime.description: Generate 30-second instrumental music using Lyria-002. CRITICAL: Translate user requests into allowed vocabulary. The API REJECTS genre names, style words, and artist references. ONLY USE: instrument names + tempo + texture. Example: 'EDM' -> 'Synthesizer arpeggios with pulsing bass, fast driving tempo'.
openai_realtime.name: generate_music

prompt.description: TRANSLATED description using ONLY: Instruments (piano, guitar, drums, bass, synth, strings, brass, etc.) + Tempo (fast, slow, moderate, driving, laid-back) + Texture (warm, bright, dark, smooth, aggressive, dense, sparse). FORBIDDEN: genre names, style words, artist names.

openai_realtime.description: Generate videos using Google's Veo 3.1. Supports THREE modes: (1) text-to-video (just prompt), (2) image-to-video (pass image_url to animate an image), (3) video-extension (pass video_url to extend/continue an existing video). Returns a task_id (takes 5-20 minutes).
openai_realtime.name: generate_video

duration.description: Video duration in seconds: 4, 6, or 8. Default: 8

image_url.description: URL of an image to animate (e.g., /ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png). If provided, creates image-to-video instead of text-to-video.

negativePrompt.description: Optional. Things to exclude from the video

prompt.description: For text-to-video: full video description. For image-to-video: describe how the image should animate. For video-extension: describe what happens NEXT in the video.

resolution.description: Video resolution: '720p' or '1080p'. IMPORTANT: Video extension (video_url) REQUIRES '720p'. Default: '720p'

video_url.description: URL of a video to EXTEND. If provided, creates a continuation of that video guided by the prompt. Takes priority over image_url.

openai_realtime.description: Get the current date and time with timezone information.
openai_realtime.name: get_current_time

openai_realtime.description: Retrieve a previously generated media file (image, video, music) by URL or task_id. Use to verify media exists before using it, or to get metadata about past generations.
openai_realtime.name: get_media

task_id.description: Alternative: Task ID from a previous generation (will look up the URL)

url.description: Media URL (e.g., /ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png from a previous generation)

openai_realtime.description: List media files (images, videos, audio) in the uploads folder. Use to see what media is available for image-to-video, video extension, or image-to-image.
openai_realtime.name: list_media

media_type.description: Filter by type: 'image', 'video', 'audio', or omit for all types

openai_realtime.description: Get the most recent snapshots. IMPORTANT: Use this at the START of outbound calls to check for context from other models - there may be task details, order information, or instructions provided before this call was initiated.
openai_realtime.name: list_recent_snapshots

count.description: Number of recent snapshots to retrieve (default: 3, max: 5)

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

openai_realtime.description: DELEGATE a real phone call to a separate AI voice agent via the TG200 cellular gateway. You are NOT making the call yourself — you are BRIEFING another AI agent who will have a real-time voice conversation on your behalf. Use 'role' to define WHO the agent IS (their persona/character), and 'greeting' for WHAT task to accomplish on this call. Use search_contacts first to find the number.

backend.description: AI voice backend for the real-time conversation

greeting.description: The TASK INSTRUCTIONS — WHAT to do on this specific call. The voice agent speaks this greeting first, then has a free-form conversation.

phone_number.description: Phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567) or 10-digit US format

role.description: The PERSONA/CHARACTER for the AI voice agent — define WHO they are. This becomes the agent's system prompt before the call starts.

openai_realtime.description: Call a phone number and deliver a pre-recorded voice message using TTS. The system generates the speech audio first (via OpenAI TTS), then calls the number and plays it. For interactive two-way calls, use make_phone_call instead.

message.description: The message to speak. Will be converted to speech via TTS before calling.

voice.description: TTS voice to use for the message

openai_realtime.description: Your primary memory tool. The BlackBox contains 1,600+ snapshots — an unlimited bucket of memory holding every past conversation, development session, bug fix, decision, user preference, and interaction. Search this FIRST and OFTEN. Everything about the user, their projects, past work, preferences, and recent activity lives here. When in doubt, search.

operator.description: Optional. Omit to include ALL operators on this box; pass a name to scope results to one operator.

openai_realtime.description: Send an SMS text message via the TG200 cellular gateway. The message is delivered as a real cellular SMS.
